hooks.command: case "$PWD" in /home/user/email-helper-app|/home/user/email-helper-app/*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; REPO=/home/user/email-helper-app; [ -d "$REPO/.git" ] || exit 0; timeout 1 git -C "$REPO" fetch -q origin main 2>/dev/null || exit 0; BEHIND=$(git -C "$REPO" rev-list --count main..origin/main 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$BEHIND" ] && exit 0; [ "$BEHIND" = "0" ] && exit 0; COMMITS=$(git -C "$REPO" log --oneline main..origin/main 2>/dev/null | head -10); MSG=$(printf 'main is behind origin/main by %s commit(s):\n%s' "$BEHIND" "$COMMITS"); printf '%s' "$MSG" | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"UserPromptSubmit",additionalContext:.}}'; exit 0
